entry.title: New: RES25-040 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF $14,000 TO THE CITY FROM THE DEPUTIES FOR THE HONOLULU POLICE DEPARTMENT'S LAW ENFORCEMENT EXPLORER PROGRAM.

Request to accept Gift to the City of $14,000 from The Deputies for the Honolulu Police Department’s Law Enforcement Explorer Program.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site
